name: Lucidya
description: AI-native Customer Experience Management (CXM) platform with autonomous AI agents capable of handling customer service across 15+ Arabic dialects. Agents directly manage conversations, detect customer intent, and resolve issues autonomously with enterprise-grade governance and compliance.
capabilities: detect and respond to customer intents
scale customer service without proportional headcount growth
notes: Launched Enterprise AI Agent platform Q1 2026 following $30M Series B. Purpose-built for MENA markets with 3x YoY sales growth in Q4 2025. Agents operate independently handling thousands of simultaneous conversations.
